title: Cloud, Collaboration & Data Center Intelligence
text:
Cloud, Collaboration & Data Center Intelligence

The Data Behind Every Cloud, Collaboration & Data Center Decision

TechInsights' Cloud, Collaboration & Data Center Intelligence — powered by Synergy Research Group - delivers the world's most trusted quarterly market share data, forecasts, and competitive analytics for cloud infrastructure and data center markets globally.

Get Started Now

Request a Demo

25+ Years of Cloud, Collaboration & Data Center Market Intelligence

TechInsights' Cloud, Collaboration & Data Center Intelligence practice is built on the foundation of Synergy Research Group — a market intelligence leader founded in 1999 with an unmatched track record in quantitative market analysis for cloud infrastructure and data center markets.

Synergy's rigorous research methodology, now integrated into the TechInsights platform, delivers comprehensive market data updated every 90 days — giving enterprise strategy, business development, and investment teams the freshest competitive intelligence available anywhere.

From global hyperscalers to colocation providers, our data is relied upon by industry-leading companies, Wall Street firms, and government institutions worldwide to track market share, size emerging segments, and forecast technology adoption.

25+ years of market data

90-day refresh cycle

100+ countries covered

5-year forward forecasts

Global — leading institutions cite SRG, now TechInsights.

In-Depth Coverage of Cloud & Data Center Markets

Our primary research covers the cloud infrastructure and data center markets in granular detail, segmented by vendor, region, and deployment type, and updated quarterly.

Hyperscale Infrastructure Intelligence: Market share, revenue, and capacity data tracking the world's largest cloud providers, AWS, Azure, Google, Meta, and beyond — including infrastructure buildout trends and competitive positioning.
Data Center Networking & Interconnect: Revenue, port shipments, and market share analytics for data center switching, routing, and interconnect, including 400G and 800G transition dynamics and silicon-level insights.
Cloud Service Provider Market Share: Quarterly market share tracking across IaaS, PaaS, and hosted infrastructure segments, with vendor-level revenue estimates and five-year forward forecasts.
Market Forecasts & Outlook: Five-year forward forecasts refreshed every six months across all major cloud and data center segments, with scenario modelling for emerging technology adoption curves including AI infrastructure and liquid cooling.

Complementing our core cloud and data center coverage, TechInsights also tracks the adjacent networking and telecom infrastructure markets that underpin global cloud connectivity.

Enterprise Network Infrastructure: Market share and revenue data for enterprise switching, routing, wireless LAN, and SD-WAN, providing context on the networks connecting enterprise environments to cloud platforms.
Carrier & Service Provider Networks: Coverage of carrier-grade routing, optical networking, and mobile infrastructure, tracking the service provider backbone that supports hyperscale and edge deployments.
Secure Networking & SASE: Quantitative market data for firewall, SASE, and secure networking segments, including vendor market share and forecasts across cloud-delivered and on-premise deployments.
Regional & Country-Level Data: All research is available with granular regional and country-level splits, enabling territory planning, competitive benchmarking, and localised go-to-market strategy across 100+ countries.

Timely Quarterly Updates

Highly detailed quarterly data is available 5–8 weeks after quarter close, so your teams act on current intelligence, not last year's numbers.

Rapid Emerging Market Coverage

Renowned for quickly sizing, segmenting, and forecasting emerging technology markets, from AI infrastructure and GPU clusters to next-generation data center architectures.

Deep Drill-Down Capability

Explore data at sub-segment level, by specific country or country group, right from within the TechInsights platform without custom data requests.

Proven Data Accuracy

A long-standing reputation for producing reliable, accurate data that leading financial institutions, trade press, and global enterprises stake their decisions on.

Cloud, Collaboration & Data Center Intelligence Integrated into the TechInsights Platform

TechInsights brings together cloud and data center market share data with our world-leading semiconductor teardown, component, and supply chain intelligence, all in one platform. It's a combination no other provider can offer.

The interactive research database gives subscribers dynamic, on-demand access to the full dataset, with custom segmentation, one-click quarterly updates, and exportable reports tailored to your business needs.

Dynamic Data Exploration – Search, filter, and manipulate market data in real time, drill into any product segment, vendor, region, or time period without waiting for custom reports.
Custom Segmentation & Reports – Create customised market segmentations and export tailored reports that match your specific business structure and competitive framing.
One-Click Research Refresh – When new quarterly data is published, your saved views and dashboards update instantly, keeping your internal reporting current without manual effort.
Cross-Domain Intelligence – Uniquely combine cloud and data center market share data with TechInsights' semiconductor teardown, component, and supply chain analysis, in a single platform

 

See Cloud, Collaboration & Data Center Intelligence in Action

Unlock the full potential of the TechInsights Platform—trusted by the world’s leading technology companies for competitive intelligence, in-depth analysis, and unmatched industry insights.

Get Started Now
